title: How large can the Item ID be?
excerpt: I have been using a cron backed by a database to update data in Monday. The database has received an Item ID greater than the maximum 32 bit integer. I know that Item ID is globally unique, so it makes since that it has …

posts.author: jeremy.devore (Jeremy Devore)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been using a cron backed by a database to update data in Monday. The database has received an Item ID greater than the maximum 32 bit integer. I know that Item ID is globally unique, so it makes since that it has gotten this large.
How large will I have to set this in order to not have an issue in the future?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jeremy.devore

Welcome to the community. See this recent post about board and item IDs Board IDs are now too big for an integer! Check your databases and update your apps :). They are now bigInt.

image1079×302 11.3 KB

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
